evidence: "This is a clean series well cast and realistic."
"This is not a docu of all doom and gloom, but, of serious concerns while offering some practical solutions."
"I really wanted to like this show. But, can a person be annoying enough to be funny?"
"This one moves along at a pretty fast clip."
"I like shows that solves crime and justice is served."
"I would recommend it for the production of the period alone."
"All the characters in this movie were interesting to me, a well cast movie."
"I like Paula Zahn, but not in this casting."
"I'm hooked, I have watched this movie many times."
"You experience the whole gamut of emotions as this brave father dealing with his own grief tries to help his children adjust."
"I enjoyed the architecture and fashion and later the first cars."
"There are gut wrenching moments over the loss of the mother from deep grief to bottled up anger."
"I have sent it as a gift to several people. A success story with no bad language."

summary: The user enjoys true stories and family dramas, often appreciating well-crafted narratives with emotional depth. They prefer fast-paced content and are sensitive to production quality, indicating a strong preference for engaging and visually appealing storytelling.
